summary: Testing complete for P0 tasks: (1) Unified Card System - birthday_cards consolidated into congrats_cards, and (2) Admin Dashboard 'Migrate All Images' button. All 14 backend tests passed. Frontend verified - Super Admin sees Internal Administration section with Migrate All Images button. Birthday card page correctly calls unified /api/congrats/card/{cardId} endpoint.

unified_card_get_endpoint.details: Returns cards from BOTH congrats_cards AND legacy birthday_cards collections with fallback query

unified_card_track_endpoint.details: Tracks download/share actions for both collections

unified_card_image_endpoint.details: Generates images for cards from both collections

unified_card_history_endpoint.details: Returns merged cards from both collections sorted by date

legacy_birthday_routes_removed.details: All legacy /api/birthday/* routes return 404 - removed from server.py

image_migration_requires_auth.details: Requires X-User-ID header, rejects invalid/non-super-admin users

image_migration_super_admin.details: Works correctly with valid super admin X-User-ID header

admin_dashboard_internal_section.details: Super Admin sees Internal Administration section with 12 items including 'Migrate All Images'

birthday_card_frontend.details: Calls /api/congrats/card/{cardId} endpoint (unified), shows 'Card not found' for invalid cards

code_verification.congrats_cards_fallback: Line 519-528 in congrats_cards.py - queries birthday_cards collection if not found in congrats_cards
code_verification.track_dual_collection: Line 621-625 in congrats_cards.py - tries congrats_cards first, then birthday_cards
code_verification.image_dual_collection: Line 688-691 in congrats_cards.py - checks both collections
code_verification.history_merged: Line 851-856 in congrats_cards.py - fetches from both collections and merges by date
code_verification.tags_import_fixed: Line 396 in tags.py imports from congrats_cards.auto_create_card
code_verification.date_triggers_import_fixed: Line 255 in date_triggers.py imports from congrats_cards.auto_create_card
code_verification.scheduler_import_fixed: Line 240 in scheduler.py imports from congrats_cards.auto_create_card

critical_code_review_comments: All imports updated correctly - tags.py, date_triggers.py, scheduler.py now import from congrats_cards.auto_create_card
Legacy birthday_cards collection data remains accessible via fallback queries - no data loss
New cards are created only in congrats_cards collection
The /api/birthday/* routes are fully removed from server.py
Admin dashboard correctly shows 'Migrate All Images' in Internal Administration section for super_admin role
context_for_next_testing_agent: Unified card system fully tested. congrats_cards.py now handles all card types (birthday, anniversary, congrats, etc.) with fallback to legacy birthday_cards collection. /api/birthday/* routes removed. Admin 'Migrate All Images' button works for super admins.
